description_long: This is a heavy-duty, industrial-style lawn mower with a robust red-painted metal frame and a powerful engine mounted centrally. The machine features a prominent hydraulic system, visible hoses, and a large horizontal cutting mechanism, suggesting it is designed for splitting or processing rather than traditional grass cutting. It is equipped with two large, rugged wheels at the rear and a smaller stabilizing wheel at the front, providing stability and maneuverability. The control panel and levers are mounted on top, allowing for easy operator access. The engine housing is compact and located on the side, with visible exhaust and fuel components. There is no visible grass collection bag, and the overall build is sturdy, with exposed mechanical parts and reinforced joints.
description: A heavy-duty, red industrial lawn mower with a central engine, hydraulic system, and large rear wheels, designed for robust outdoor use. It features exposed mechanical parts and a compact engine housing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large rear wheels, central hydraulic system, and the main control area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long horizontal cutting mechanism, engine housing, and hydraulic hoses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stabilizing front wheel, engine components, and the overall width of the machine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the engine housing, control levers, and the absence of a grass collection bag.
attribute_wheel_configuration: two large rear wheels and one small front wheel
attribute_engine_housing: compact engine housing mounted on the side above the wheel
